fml.menu.mods.mainPage.title: Metalion's Experience Tweaks
experiencetweaks.command.reset.data_unav: Enchantment data is not available (server not running?).
experiencetweaks.command.reset.no_data: %s had no cooldown data to reset.
experiencetweaks.enchant.tooltip.no_cons: Your level will not be consumed in enchanting.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x001: Invalid consumable item configured. Lapis Lazuli will be used as fallback. Check 'enchantmentCostItem' and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x002: Configured consumable item was not found in the registry. Lapis Lazuli will be used as fallback. Check 'enchantmentCostItem' for typos.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x003: Could not read the 'directExperience' setting. Experience will drop directly to players (default). Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x004: Could not read the 'dontKeepExperience' list. All players will keep experience on death (default). Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x005: Could not read the item cost multiplier for enchanting. Using 1.5x as fallback. Check 'enchantmentCostMultiplier' and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x006: Could not read the enchantment cooldown mode. Using 'current_level' as fallback. Check 'enchantmentCooldownType' and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x007: Could not read enchantment button base levels. Default thresholds will be used. Check 'enchantmentBaseRequiredLevels' and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x008: Could not read the enchantment difficulty bias. Using 0.25 (balanced default). Check 'enchantmentRequiredLevelBias' and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x009: Could not read 'giveExperienceEveryDay' setting. Daily experience rewards will be disabled by default. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x00a: Could not read 'giveExperienceEveryDayBase' setting. Falling back to 5 experience points. Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.config.error.et_0x00b: Could not read 'giveExperienceEveryDayGrowth' setting. Falling back to 0.1 (10% growth). Check and reload the config.
experiencetweaks.daily_xp.reward: You survived another day without dying and earned %s experience points! (Survival streak: %s days).
